indonesian: Saya pergi ke sekolah kemarin.
english: I went to school yesterday.

indonesian: Dia sedang membaca buku.
english: She is reading a book.

indonesian: Mereka bermain sepak bola setiap hari.
english: They play football every day.

indonesian: Saya belajar bahasa Inggris karena saya ingin mendapat nilai bagus.
english: I study English because I want to get good grades.

indonesian: Kami akan pergi ke pantai besok.
english: We will go to the beach tomorrow.

indonesian: Dia telah menyelesaikan pekerjaannya.
english: She has finished her work.

indonesian: Jika saya punya waktu, saya akan membantumu.
english: If I have time, I will help you.

indonesian: Buku yang saya baca sangat menarik.
english: The book that I read is very interesting.

indonesian: Ibu saya memasak makanan yang lezat setiap malam.
english: My mother cooks delicious food every night.

indonesian: Saya tidak bisa datang ke pesta kemarin karena saya sakit.
english: I could not come to the party yesterday because I was sick.

indonesian: Adik saya sedang tidur ketika saya pulang.
english: My younger sibling was sleeping when I came home.

indonesian: Guru menjelaskan pelajaran dengan sangat jelas.
english: The teacher explained the lesson very clearly.

indonesian: Saya sudah makan sebelum kamu datang.
english: I had already eaten before you came.

indonesian: Orang yang rajin pasti akan sukses.
english: A diligent person will definitely succeed.

indonesian: Meskipun dia lelah, dia tetap belajar.
english: Although she was tired, she kept studying.

indonesian: Buku itu telah ditulis oleh seorang penulis terkenal.
english: That book was written by a famous author.

indonesian: Semakin banyak kamu belajar, semakin pintar kamu.
english: The more you study, the smarter you become.

indonesian: Dia bertanya apakah saya mau pergi bersamanya.
english: She asked whether I wanted to go with her.

indonesian: Proyek ini harus diselesaikan sebelum akhir bulan.
english: This project must be completed before the end of the month.

indonesian: Mereka telah bekerja selama lebih dari sepuluh tahun di perusahaan ini.
english: They have been working for more than ten years at this company.
